design_philosophy: A calming, highly functional, and reliable navigation tool for pilgrims in Masjid Al Haram. Uses deep spiritual colors (Forest Green, Gold) over high-contrast bone-white to reduce glare in the intense Makkah sun. Emphasizes one-handed usability with bottom-heavy interfaces and clear typography.

navigation.style: bg-white border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe pt-2 shadow-lg

MapTab.layout: Full-screen map view with absolute positioned floating overlays
components: Top Floating Pill: Online/Offline status indicator. Use glassmorphism (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md) bounded by rounded-full.
Right FABs: 'Center Location' and 'Toggle Map Layers'. Circular buttons, shadow-md, absolute right-4 bottom-32.
Bottom Sheet: Draggable sheet showing 'Nearest Gate' by default. Features a large distance metric (e.g., '150m') and a prominent 'Show Route' primary button.
Header: 'Haram Gates' (text-3xl font-bold text-primary, mt-4 mb-2).
Search/Filter: Minimalist search input, bg-gray-100 rounded-full px-4 py-3 mb-4.
Gate Card: Row layout. Left: Green circular icon. Middle: Gate Name + Number. Right: Distance. bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100.

AmenitiesTab.layout: Sticky horizontal category pills + Vertical FlatList
components: Category ScrollView: Horizontal pills for 'Grocery', 'Restaurant', 'Bus', 'Taxi', 'Meqat'. Active pill: bg-primary text-white. Inactive: bg-gray-100 text-gray-600.
Amenity Card: Similar layout to Gate Card, incorporating specific category icons (e.g., ShoppingCart, Utensils).
Hero Image: Top header image showing the mosque interior.
Offline Maps Section: Progress bar for downloaded tiles, 'Download Makkah Region' CTA.
Preferences Section: Distance unit toggle (km/m), Sync data manually button.

components.cards: Prioritize flat, cardless designs where possible. When cards are needed for touch targets, use bg-white rounded-2xl with a very subtle shadow (shadow-sm) and 1px border (border-border).
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 items-center justify-center. Ensure all touch targets are at least 48x48 points for mobile accessibility.
components.bottom_sheet: Must use a prominent drag indicator (pill) at the top. Background should be solid white to obscure the map cleanly. Add shadow-xl to the top edge.
components.map_markers: User location: pulsing blue dot with a transparent blue aura. Gates: Dark green pin icon. Amenities: Gold/Sand pin icon.

icons.rules: Use strokeWidth 2.0. Standard size 24px. For empty states, use size 48px with text-gray-300.

images.usage: Use as a low opacity background (opacity-5 to opacity-10) for empty states or header areas in the Settings/Gates tabs.

images.description: View of the inside of Masjid Al Haram
images.usage: Use as a hero header image for the Settings tab to add spiritual immersion.

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use React Native Reanimated or LayoutAnimation for smooth BottomSheet transitions and list filtering. Map region changes should animate fluidly.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a 'testID' attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). E.g., testID='tab-map', testID='btn-download-offline'.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native Expo app. You MUST use React Native primitives (View, Text, FlatList, TouchableOpacity) and Native UI patterns.
Do NOT use HTML elements (div, span) or standard Shadcn UI components meant for the web.
Use 'react-native-maps' with 'UrlTile' pointing to OpenStreetMap for the map implementation.
Use '@gorhom/bottom-sheet' for the interactive map overlay.
Use 'NativeWind' for styling. The classes provided in the typography and layout sections are Tailwind classes intended to be used with NativeWind (className prop).
Ensure touch targets (TouchableOpacity/Pressable) are a minimum of 48x48 points.
Apply 'testID' instead of 'data-testid' for testing purposes.
